sql.where:
ub.enabled = true
and ub.bsns_year = #{bsnsYear}
and ub.bsns_year_detail_cd = #{bsnsYearDetailCd}
and ub.bsns_nm like concat('%', #{bsnsNm}, '%')
and ub.chrg_dept_nm like concat('%', #{chrgDeptNm}, '%')
and ci.member_nm like concat('%', #{chargerNm}, '%')
and ub.bsns_cd like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') and usb.stdr_bsns_cd like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') and usb.stdr_bsns_nm like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')

mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsDao.selectListCount */ select count(ub.bsns_cd) as cnt from uspt_bsns ub inner join uspt_stdr_bsns usb on usb.stdr_bsns_cd = ub.stdr_bsns_cd left outer join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.reprsnt_charger = true left outer join cmmt_insider ci on ci.member_id = ubc.insider_id

/** UsptBsnsDao.selectList */ select ub.bsns_cd , ub.bsns_nm , ub.stdr_bsns_cd , usb.stdr_bsns_nm , ub.bsns_year , ci.member_nm as charger_nm , ub.chrg_dept_nm , to_char(ub.created_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as reg_dt , ub.task_type_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@TASK_CODE_GROUP}', ub.task_type_cd) as task_type_nm , row_number() over (order by ub.created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_bsns ub inner join uspt_stdr_bsns usb on usb.stdr_bsns_cd = ub.stdr_bsns_cd left outer join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.reprsnt_charger = true left outer join cmmt_insider ci on ci.member_id = ubc.insider_id
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

/** UsptBsnsDao.select */ select ub.bsns_cd , ub.bsns_nm , ub.ecshg_instt_nm , ub.ecshg_instt_cd , ub.erp_cd , ub.tot_bsns_pd , ub.cnsrtm , ub.chrg_dept_nm , ub.bsns_year_type_cd , ub.bsns_year , ub.bsns_year_detail_cd , ub.task_type_cd , usb.stdr_bsns_cd , usb.stdr_bsns_nm , usb.begin_year , usb.bsns_type_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@BT_CODE_GROUP}', usb.bsns_type_cd) as bsns_type_nm , usb.bsns_sumry , coalesce((select bsns_cl_nm || ' > ' from uspt_bsns_cl where bsns_cl_id = ubc.parent_bsns_cl_id and enabled = true), '') || ubc.bsns_cl_nm as bsns_cl_nm from uspt_bsns ub inner join uspt_stdr_bsns usb on usb.stdr_bsns_cd = ub.stdr_bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_cl ubc on ubc.bsns_cl_id = usb.bsns_cl_id where bsns_cd = #{bsnsCd}
/** UsptBsnsDao.selectBsnsPblancCount */ select count(*) from uspt_bsns ub inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd where ub.bsns_cd = #{bsnsCd}
/** UsptBsnsDao.selectBsnsYearList */ select distinct bsns_year from uspt_bsns where enabled = true order by bsns_year desc
